title: PEER SUPPORT - 211info
text: SRIPONYA COLLECTIVE PEER SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides young people with mental health challenges with support from trained young adults who have similar lived experiences. 29 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger, must have OHP Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-6pm during the school year. Email (541) 498-0968 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 498-0968 Main phone Main phone (541) 498-0968 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jefferson County Services: Mentoring Programs * Youth Issues Peer Mental Health Support Services * Youth Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - MADRAS YOUTH DROP IN CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SRIPONYA COLLECTIVE
